name: 春秋争霸
description: 公元前770年，周平王东迁洛邑，王室衰微，诸侯争霸。你将扮演一方诸侯，在礼崩乐坏的时代中纵横捭阖，决定华夏文明的走向。
descriptionEn: 770 BC, King Ping of Zhou moved the capital east. The royal house declined and the feudal lords vied for hegemony. You play as a feudal lord in this era of broken rites, shaping the course of Chinese civilization.

culture.publicOpinion: 对旧秩序的质疑日益增长

historicalEvents.title: 平王东迁
historicalEvents.description: 周平王将都城从镐京东迁至洛邑，标志着东周开始，王室权威急剧下降。
historicalEvents.descriptionEn: King Ping moved the capital from Haojing to Luoyi, marking the beginning of Eastern Zhou and a sharp decline in royal authority.

historicalEvents.title: 齐桓公即位
historicalEvents.description: 齐桓公即位，任用管仲为相，推行改革，齐国迅速强盛。
historicalEvents.descriptionEn: Duke Huan of Qi ascended, appointed Guan Zhong as chancellor, implemented reforms, and Qi rapidly grew powerful.

historicalEvents.title: 召陵之盟
historicalEvents.description: 齐桓公率诸侯联军伐楚，双方在召陵结盟，齐国霸业达到顶峰。
historicalEvents.descriptionEn: Duke Huan led a coalition against Chu, resulting in the Treaty of Zhaoling, marking the peak of Qi's hegemony.

factions.name: 周王室
factions.description: 名义上的天下共主，但实际权力已大幅衰落。
factions.descriptionEn: The nominal ruler of all under heaven, but actual power has greatly declined.

factions.name: 齐国
factions.description: 东方大国，经济繁荣，军力强盛。
factions.descriptionEn: A major eastern power with a prosperous economy and strong military.

factions.name: 楚国
factions.description: 南方霸主，疆域辽阔，野心勃勃。
factions.descriptionEn: The southern hegemon with vast territory and great ambition.

factions.name: 晋国
factions.description: 北方强国，内部权力斗争激烈。
factions.descriptionEn: A northern power with intense internal power struggles.
